d3t_e1_investor.speaker: Mentor
d3t_e1_investor.text: Day 3 and business is booming! Your cash flow is healthy, and people are noticing. A local investor just walked in.

d3t_e1_investor_b.speaker: Investor
d3t_e1_investor_b.text: I've been watching your laundromat's growth. Your numbers are impressive. I want to offer you seed funding to expand. What do you think?

choices.text: Express strong interest — ask for details
Ask what they want in return first
Thank them — prefer to grow organically
Ask for time to consult your team

d3t_e1_interest.speaker: Investor
d3t_e1_interest.text: Love the enthusiasm! Here's my proposal: funding in exchange for 20% stake. Your growth potential is exactly what I look for.

d3t_e1_terms.speaker: Investor
d3t_e1_terms.text: Smart question. I want 20% equity and a seat on your advisory board. In return, you get capital and my network.

d3t_e1_organic.speaker: Investor
d3t_e1_organic.text: I respect that philosophy. Bootstrapped businesses have incredible character. My offer stands if you change your mind.

d3t_e1_consult.speaker: Investor
d3t_e1_consult.text: Consulting your team before major decisions shows real leadership. Take the time you need. Here's my card.

d3t_e1_result_interest.speaker: Mentor
d3t_e1_result_interest.text: Strong financial performance attracts investors. Enthusiasm opens doors, but make sure excitement doesn't override due diligence.

d3t_e1_result_terms.speaker: Mentor
d3t_e1_result_terms.text: Understanding what you give up is as important as what you gain. Equity dilution is permanent — know the full cost of capital.

d3t_e1_result_organic.speaker: Mentor
d3t_e1_result_organic.text: Organic growth preserves full ownership and control. It's slower, but the business remains entirely yours.

d3t_e1_result_consult.speaker: Mentor
d3t_e1_result_consult.text: Inclusive decision-making on major moves builds team trust and often surfaces blind spots you'd have missed alone.

d3t_r_expansion_offer.speaker: Mentor
d3t_r_expansion_offer.text: A real estate agent just called. A prime location nearby is available — perfect for a second laundromat.

d3t_r_expansion_b.speaker: Agent
d3t_r_expansion_b.text: Given your success, this space is perfect for you. First month free if you sign today. Interested?

d3t_r_expansion_yes.speaker: Agent
d3t_r_expansion_yes.text: Excellent decision! The space is yours. Bold moves separate growing businesses from stagnant ones.

d3t_r_expansion_think.speaker: Agent
d3t_r_expansion_think.text: Fair enough. 48 hours — after that, it's back on the market.

d3t_r_expansion_negotiate.speaker: Agent
d3t_r_expansion_negotiate.text: The owner is motivated. Your offer was accepted. Smart negotiating saved you capital.

d3t_r_expansion_pass.speaker: Mentor
d3t_r_expansion_pass.text: Consolidation before expansion is wise. Many businesses fail by growing too fast.

d3t_r_expansion_result_yes.speaker: Mentor
d3t_r_expansion_result_yes.text: Moving decisively on rare opportunities is a key entrepreneurial skill. Your success gave you this option.

d3t_r_expansion_result_think.speaker: Mentor
d3t_r_expansion_result_think.text: Taking time under pressure shows discipline. Use the 48 hours wisely.

d3t_r_expansion_result_negotiate.speaker: Mentor
d3t_r_expansion_result_negotiate.text: Negotiating even in favorable markets is smart. Every peso saved can be reinvested.

d3t_r_expansion_result_pass.speaker: Mentor
d3t_r_expansion_result_pass.text: Depth before breadth. A perfect single location often outperforms two mediocre ones.

d3t_r_award_nomination.speaker: Inspector
d3t_r_award_nomination.text: I'm from the Local Business Association. Your laundromat has been nominated for 'Best Small Business of the Year!'

d3t_r_award_b.speaker: You
d3t_r_award_b.text: An unexpected nomination! How do you respond?

choices.text: Humbly decline — too humble for awards

d3t_r_award_accept.speaker: Inspector
d3t_r_award_accept.text: Wonderful! Your dedication to cleanliness and service is an inspiration.

d3t_r_award_ask.speaker: Inspector
d3t_r_award_ask.text: Smart to ask! It's mostly a plaque and a feature in the local paper. No obligations.

d3t_r_award_decline.speaker: Inspector
d3t_r_award_decline.text: I respect your humility. The offer stands if you change your mind.

d3t_r_award_result_accept.speaker: Mentor
d3t_r_award_result_accept.text: Recognition builds reputation. Accepting awards graciously sends a signal of confidence.

d3t_r_award_result_ask.speaker: Mentor
d3t_r_award_result_ask.text: Due diligence before commitment is always wise. You got the full picture and made an informed decision.

d3t_r_award_result_decline.speaker: Mentor
d3t_r_award_result_decline.text: Humility is admirable, but recognition has value. Sometimes accepting praise is as important as earning it.

d3t_r_partnership.speaker: Mentor
d3t_r_partnership.text: A nearby cafe owner wants to collaborate on a joint promotion. Your success has attracted attention.

d3t_r_partnership_b.speaker: Cafe Owner
d3t_r_partnership_b.text: Your laundromat is the busiest on the street. A joint promotion could double both our customer bases. Interested?

d3t_r_partnership_agree.speaker: Cafe Owner
d3t_r_partnership_agree.text: Fantastic! 'Wash and Coffee' — I love it! This is going to be incredible.

d3t_r_partnership_details.speaker: Cafe Owner
d3t_r_partnership_details.text: Due diligence is important. Let me walk you through the full plan.

d3t_r_partnership_pilot.speaker: Cafe Owner
d3t_r_partnership_pilot.text: A pilot is a brilliant idea. Test the waters before diving in.

d3t_r_partnership_result_agree.speaker: Mentor
d3t_r_partnership_result_agree.text: Strategic partnerships multiply reach. Your success attracted this opportunity — now it's compounding.

d3t_r_partnership_result_details.speaker: Mentor
d3t_r_partnership_result_details.text: Never commit without understanding the full picture. Asking for details protects your interests.

d3t_r_partnership_result_pilot.speaker: Mentor
d3t_r_partnership_result_pilot.text: Pilots reduce risk. Testing compatibility before full commitment is one of the smartest moves.

d3t_e3_staff_development.speaker: Mentor
d3t_e3_staff_development.text: With strong finances, you can now invest in staff development. A training program could boost team performance.

d3t_e3_staff_b.speaker: Staff
d3t_e3_staff_b.text: Boss, we heard you're doing well. Some of us were hoping for professional development. Would you consider investing in us?

d3t_e3_full.speaker: Staff
d3t_e3_full.text: This means so much! Investing in your team shows you see us as more than just workers. We'll make you proud.

d3t_e3_internal.speaker: Staff
d3t_e3_internal.text: Learning directly from you is valuable. Your experience in this laundromat is irreplaceable.

d3t_e3_sponsor.speaker: Staff
d3t_e3_sponsor.text: Choosing one person is tough, but it's a start. The selected team member is overjoyed.

d3t_e3_decline.speaker: Staff
d3t_e3_decline.text: We understand, but it's a little disheartening. We hope opportunities come for us eventually.

d3t_e3_result_full.speaker: Mentor
d3t_e3_result_full.text: Team investment when finances allow creates compounding returns. Skilled, motivated staff deliver better results and stay longer.

d3t_e3_result_internal.speaker: Mentor
d3t_e3_result_internal.text: Internal knowledge transfer is undervalued. Your specific business context can't be taught externally.

d3t_e3_result_sponsor.speaker: Mentor
d3t_e3_result_sponsor.text: Merit-based development motivates the whole team, even when only one benefits. Make selection criteria clear.

d3t_e3_result_decline.speaker: Mentor
d3t_e3_result_decline.text: Prioritizing business reinvestment over people has limits. Your team is your most important asset.

d3t_e4_premium_upgrade.speaker: Mentor
d3t_e4_premium_upgrade.text: A premium equipment supplier is offering a deal on high-efficiency machines. They cost more upfront but save money long-term.

d3t_e4_upgrade_b.speaker: Supplier
d3t_e4_upgrade_b.text: These machines use 40% less water and energy. Higher upfront cost, but you'll save thousands over time. Interested?

d3t_e4_full.speaker: Customer
d3t_e4_full.text: These new machines are so quiet and fast! This is the best laundromat experience I've ever had.

d3t_e4_half.speaker: Customer
d3t_e4_half.text: The new machines are great! Hope you upgrade the rest soon.

d3t_e4_trial.speaker: Supplier
d3t_e4_trial.text: Two-week trial period. You'll see the savings yourself.

d3t_e4_decline.speaker: Mentor
d3t_e4_decline.text: Short-term savings can mean long-term costs. Efficient machines pay for themselves eventually.

d3t_e4_result_full.speaker: Mentor
d3t_e4_result_full.text: Bold investment in efficiency pays off. Lower operational costs and happier customers — a winning combination.

d3t_e4_result_half.speaker: Mentor
d3t_e4_result_half.text: Phased upgrades balance cost and improvement. Smart way to manage cash flow while modernizing.

d3t_e4_result_trial.speaker: Mentor
d3t_e4_result_trial.text: Testing before committing is wise. Data will guide your decision.

d3t_e4_result_decline.speaker: Mentor
d3t_e4_result_decline.text: Sometimes you need to spend money to save money. Don't let short-term thinking limit long-term gains.

d3t_e5_community_impact.speaker: Mentor
d3t_e5_community_impact.text: End of a successful day. The neighborhood association wants to honor your laundromat's positive impact.

d3t_e5_community_b.speaker: Community Leader
d3t_e5_community_b.text: Your laundromat has become a neighborhood anchor. We want to present you with a Community Service Award.

d3t_e5_accept.speaker: Community Leader
d3t_e5_accept.text: Thank you! Your laundromat has made a real difference here.

d3t_e5_credit.speaker: Staff
d3t_e5_credit.text: You're giving us credit? Best boss ever! This means so much.

d3t_e5_humble.speaker: Community Leader
d3t_e5_humble.text: Your humility is admirable. The award is well deserved.

d3t_e5_result_accept.speaker: Mentor
d3t_e5_result_accept.text: Accepting recognition graciously builds your reputation. Your success has created positive community impact.

d3t_e5_result_credit.speaker: Mentor
d3t_e5_result_credit.text: Sharing credit builds loyalty. Your team will work even harder for a leader who lifts them up.

d3t_e5_result_humble.speaker: Mentor
d3t_e5_result_humble.text: Humility is a virtue, but don't be afraid to stand in your success. You've earned it.
